fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The selected ticket renders as one primary document surface in the main layout. 2. Title, key metadata, and description are visible in the same reading context without a separate metadata panel. 3. Asset content is contextualized within the document area instead of appearing only as a detached raw tab. 4. The new document remains readable in split and content-only modes.

Title, key metadata, and description are visible in the same reading context without a separate metadata panel. 3. Asset content is contextualized within the document area instead of appearing only as a detached raw tab. 4. The new document remains readable in split and content-only modes.
fields.implementation_summary: Content mode now renders an integrated ticket document with a header, compact metadata cards, and inline asset context while split mode keeps the separate detail inspector available. The document header now resolves selected-ticket summaries by id in the active route workspace and hydrates ticket detail fields directly, so hash-selected and mixed-workspace tickets keep their title and key metadata even when the route workspace differs from the owning ticket reference.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Build integrated ticket document panel

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The selected ticket renders as one primary document surface in the main layout. 2. Title, key metadata, and description are visible in the same reading context without a separate metadata panel. 3. Asset content is contextualized within the document area instead of appearing only as a detached raw tab. 4. The new document remains readable in split and content-only modes.
fields.implementation_summary: Content mode now renders an integrated ticket document with a header, compact metadata cards, inline asset context, and a generic field section for the remaining top-level ticket.toml fields. Mixed-workspace selection now resolves the owning ticket reference for document fetches, and the TOML tab reuses the hydrated ticket fields so the integrated document and raw field view stay aligned.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Build integrated ticket document panel
